articles.title: Video-Oasis: Rethinking Evaluation of Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: The inherent complexity of video understanding makes it difficult to determine whether Video-LLM benchmark performance stems from visual perception, linguistic reasoning, or knowledge priors. While many benchmarks have emerged to assess high-level reasoning, shared criteria for evaluating video unde
articles.summary: 提出Video-Oasis，重新思考视频理解评估。针对Video-LLM基准性能来源（视觉感知、语言推理、先验知识）难以区分的问题，建立共享评估标准，更准确地衡量视频理解能力。

articles.title: Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench: Testing the Limits of Agents on Long-Horizon Terminal Tasks with Dense Reward-Based Grading
articles.excerpt: AI agents have become capable of autonomously completing short, well-specified tasks. However, existing terminal benchmarks largely focus on simple problems that finish within minutes and are evaluated only by their final outcome. This setup overlooks intermediate progress and partial solutions, yie
articles.summary: 提出Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench，针对AI智能体长时域终端任务。现有基准仅评估最终结果，忽略中间进展。该基准采用密集奖励评分，测试智能体长时间任务极限，更全面反映部分解决方案效果。

articles.title: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
articles.excerpt: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. However, many forms of knowledge are conveyed through visual representations, where figures, typeset equations, and page layouts carry rich information that cannot be faithfully or
articles.summary: 提出可扩展视觉预训练方法，增强语言智能。大量知识蕴含于图形、排版方程和页面布局等视觉表征，纯文本预训练无法忠实获取。该方法通过视觉预训练让大模型吸收视觉知识，提升语言理解能力。

articles.title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
articles.excerpt: Driven by next-token prediction, NLP shifted from task-specific models into powerful generalist foundation models. What, then, is the equivalent catalyst needed to achieve a general-purpose model in computer vision? In this paper, we contend that large-scale text-to-video generation serves as a stro
articles.summary: 本文认为大规模文本到视频生成可作为计算机视觉通用模型的催化剂。如同NLP中next-token prediction催生通用基础模型，视频生成模型学习丰富视觉知识，成为通用视觉学习者，为诸多任务提供统一框架。

articles.title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
articles.excerpt: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Be
articles.summary: 提出IdeaGene-Bench，基准测试AI系统对科学思想谱系推理和基于谱系的思想生成能力。科学思想像基因组一样继承机制、修复局限、重组先前工作，评估AI是否理解和延续这种继承结构。

articles.title: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks
articles.excerpt: The rapid development of large language models and multimodal large language models has accelerated the emergence of proactive agents capable of operating everyday tools and assisting users in real-world environments. However, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate such agents effectively, as they
articles.summary: 提出UniClawBench，通用真实世界任务主动智能体基准。现有基准难以评估操作日常工具、辅助用户的主动智能体。该基准提供统一框架，覆盖多种真实场景，衡量工具操作和任务完成能力。

articles.title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
articles.excerpt: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-ba
articles.summary: 提出LongE2V，利用预训练视频扩散模型先验，从稀疏事件流联合处理长期视频重建、预测和帧插值。回归方法模糊纹理，现有生成模型长期不稳定。LongE2V实现高质量、稳定的长期视频恢复。

articles.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
articles.excerpt: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas36
articles.summary: 提出Canvas360，两阶段上下文全景生成框架。先进行几何感知预训练，再针对下游任务微调。为解决缺乏大规模高质量训练数据的问题，还提出数据生成方法，提升全景生成质量和上下文一致性。

articles.title: Trust Region Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: Big goals are hard to achieve all at once; breaking them into small steps is wiser. We present Trust Region Policy Distillation (TOP-D), which transforms the notoriously unstable, high-variance On-Policy Distillation (OPD) into a stable training paradigm by dynamically constructing a proximal teache
articles.summary: 提出Trust Region Policy Distillation (TOP-D)，通过动态构建近端教师，将不稳定、高方差的同策略蒸馏转化为稳定训练范式。采用信任区域约束，逐步分解目标，提升蒸馏可靠性。

articles.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known
articles.summary: 提出OpenCoF，通过视频生成进行推理。不同于传统Chain-of-Thought (CoT)，推理在时间连续帧中展开，视频生成模型提供新推理路径，使大模型通过可视化序列理解逻辑结果。

articles.title: KronQ: LLM Quantization via Kronecker-Factored Hessian
articles.excerpt: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is a widely adopted technique for compressing large language models (LLMs) without retraining. Existing second-order PTQ methods, including GPTQ, construct quantization objectives exclusively from input activation statistics, effectively assuming that all output chan
articles.summary: 提出KronQ，利用Kronecker分解的Hessian矩阵进行LLM后训练量化。现有二阶方法（如GPTQ）仅从输入激活统计构造目标，忽略输出通道。KronQ更精确建模量化损失，提升量化后模型质量。

articles.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE
articles.excerpt: Modern LLMs are increasingly deployed in long-context applications such as retrieval-augmented generation, repository-level coding, and agentic workflows whose accumulated reasoning and tool traces routinely push the input an order of magnitude past the pretraining window, making zero-shot context e
articles.summary: 提出Jet-Long，使用动态双焦点RoPE实现高效长上下文扩展。针对LLM输入长度远超预训练窗口导致零样本扩展困难的问题，动态双焦点RoPE在保持效率的同时有效扩展上下文长度。

articles.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) is becoming increasingly important for post-training large language models (LLMs). Previous RL pipelines for LLMs were mostly synchronous and batch-interleaved, which is inefficient for long-horizon agentic tasks. Recently, asynchronous RL has emerged as a more efficient
articles.summary: 提出单轨迹异步优化方法，用于智能体强化学习。先前LLM的RL管线多为同步批处理，在长时间智能体任务中效率低下。该方法通过单次轨迹异步更新，显著提升训练效率。

articles.title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
articles.excerpt: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterati
articles.summary: 提出CineMobile，设备端图像到视频扩散框架，用于电影级相机运动生成（如子弹时间、推拉变焦、慢动作）。针对DiT参数量大不适于移动设备的问题，在手机上高效生成高质量视频。

articles.title: Automating the Design of Embodied Agent Architectures
articles.excerpt: Embodied agents are typically built as hand-designed compositions of perception, memory, planning, and action modules. This modularity exposes a large architectural design space, but current systems still rely on researcher intuition to choose where information is stored, how observations are proces
articles.summary: 提出自动化设计具身智能体架构的方法。传统智能体依赖人工设计感知、记忆、规划和动作模块组合，设计空间大但依赖直觉。该方法通过自动搜索优化模块组成，探索更优架构。

articles.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
articles.excerpt: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. As trajectories grow, task requirements, environment facts, prior attempts, diagnoses, and open subgoals can be buried in the context window or pushed bey
articles.summary: 提出Proactive Memory Agent，用于长时间任务主动记忆。随着轨迹增长，决策相关状态被淹没在上下文中。该智能体主动识别和提取关键信息，确保长时域任务中记忆及时可用。

articles.title: Sparse Delta Memory: Scaling the State of Linear RNNs through Sparsity
articles.excerpt: Linear attention models allow a fixed state size and a fixed amount of compute per token. However, due to their limited state size, linear attention models fall behind in long-context recall compared to softmax-attention-based transformer architectures. Increasing the state size of linear attention
articles.summary: 提出Sparse Delta Memory，通过稀疏性扩展线性RNN状态大小。线性注意力模型因状态有限在长上下文回忆上落后于Transformer。该方法引入稀疏增量更新，增加有效状态容量，提升长上下文性能。

articles.title: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation
articles.excerpt: We present AgentLens, a production-assessed benchmark for interactive code agents. Most code-agent benchmarks reduce a run to a single bit -- did the task pass? -- but the people who actually use these agents experience the entire trajectory: how the agent follows instructions, uses its tools, verif
articles.summary: 提出AgentLens，生产环境评估的交互式代码智能体基准。大多数基准仅用通过/失败衡量，而用户关注整个轨迹（指令遵循、工具使用、验证等）。AgentLens通过生产环境轨迹评审提供全面评估。

articles.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
articles.excerpt: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. We formalize this failure as the \textbf{Knowing--Using Gap}, characterized by an accuracy gap and a temporal lag between memorization and ge
articles.summary: 将LLM微调中新知识记忆但无法用于推理的现象形式化为”Knowing-Using Gap”，表现为准确率差距和记忆与泛化之间的时间滞后。探索机制原因，为提升微调后推理能力提供理解基础。

articles.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
articles.excerpt: Long-context processing has become increasingly important for large language models (LLMs), but simply extending the context window does not guarantee effective utilization of long inputs. As input length grows, accuracy often degrades, indicating that models still struggle to identify and use the e

articles.title: UP: Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization for Breaking the Exploration-Stability Dilemma
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become the standard paradigm for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). To achieve sample efficiency, modern RL frameworks rely on importance sampling (IS). However, these algorithms suffer from an exploration-stability dilemma.

articles.title: RoboTALES: Learning Reasoning-Guided Robot Policies via Task-Aligned Simulated Futures
articles.excerpt: Pretrained video generative models are promising backbones for visuomotor control, but their imagined futures often drift from task intent and are not reliably action-conditional. As a result, these models can be difficult to use for planning or policy extraction. To address these limitations, we pr

articles.title: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo
articles.excerpt: Large Language Models (LLMs) unlocked new possibilities in automated code writing, becoming the backbone of most code completion tools. While LLMs excel in mainstream languages, they often lack support for the so-called low-resource languages where training data is scarce. As a result, these languag

articles.title: Flow-ERD: Agent-type Aware Flow Matching with Entropy-Regularized Distillation for Diverse Traffic Simulation
articles.excerpt: Realistic and diverse traffic simulation is essential to autonomous driving development. Yet prevailing benchmarks predominantly reward realism, and recent methods have optimized accordingly, leaving diversity underexplored. We introduce Flow-ERD, a multi-agent simulator that pursues realism and div

articles.excerpt: A key challenge in Arabic NLP is the scarcity of dialectal data relative to Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), causing LLMs to overproduce MSA and struggle with dialectally accurate generation. From an interpretability perspective, this raises a fundamental question: where and how are dialectal features

articles.title: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as integrated data-science agents, combining abstract reasoning with advanced tool use. Yet the relevant benchmark landscape largely divides into symbolic causal reasoning benchmarks without realistic data analysis or data analysis benchmarks without a p

articles.title: MedPMC: A Systematic Framework for Scaling High-Fidelity Medical Multimodal Data for Foundation Models
articles.excerpt: Medicine is inherently multimodal, requiring clinicians to synthesize information across diverse data streams. articles.title: Phone Segmentation and Recognition through Phonological Activation Mapping
articles.excerpt: Phone segmentation and recognition are inherently related tasks, yet modern approaches typically model them separately. articles.excerpt: Pixel-wise Earth-observation (EO) foundation models are now achieving state-of-the-art performance via generated spatial embeddings.
